name: Strategy Pivot
description: Detects tool execution failures (especially exec) and forces the agent to abandon the current approach by injecting a strong guidance prompt to try completely different strategies.

watchedTools.description: List of tool names to monitor for failures. Default: ['exec']

minFailuresBeforePivot.description: Number of consecutive failures on the same tool before injecting the pivot message

promptTemplate.description: Custom prompt template. Use {toolName}, {error}, and {result} as placeholders.
